mapper.sql: id, invoice_no, order_no, itemNo, model_no, quantity, trans_type, trans_time, trans_psn, remark, corder_no, customer_no, user_no, from_type
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._transdata
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._transdata (id, invoice_no, order_no, itemNo, model_no, quantity, trans_type, trans_time, trans_psn, remark, corder_no, customer_no, user_no, from_type) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{transType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{transTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{transPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromType,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into dbo._transdata
id,
invoice_no,
order_no,
itemNo,
model_no,
quantity,
trans_type,
trans_time,
trans_psn,
remark,
corder_no,
customer_no,
user_no,
from_type,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{transType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{transTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{transPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{fromType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update dbo._transdata
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
trans_type = #{record.transType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
trans_time = #{record.transTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
trans_psn = #{record.transPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
corder_no = #{record.corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_type = #{record.fromType,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo._transdata set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, itemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, trans_type = #{record.transType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, trans_time = #{record.transTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, trans_psn = #{record.transPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, corder_no = #{record.corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, from_type = #{record.fromType,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo._transdata
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemNo = #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
trans_type = #{transType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
trans_time = #{transTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
trans_psn = #{transPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
corder_no = #{corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_type = #{fromType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo._transdata set invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, itemNo = #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, trans_type = #{transType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, trans_time = #{transTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, trans_psn = #{transPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, corder_no = #{corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, from_type = #{fromType,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
